title: System Shutdown Procedure
description:
System Shutdown Procedure

System Shutdown Procedure

It is very important to shutdown the system properly. If the PC is turned off before shutdown, the controller UPS battery becomes overloaded and deteriorated, and also the files on the PC can be damaged.

There are three methods to shutdown the system:

Shutdown from the Windows Start menu
	Shutdown from the Shutdown dialog with Epson
	 RC+ 8.0 shutdown
	Execute the Shutdown command from the SPEL+
	 program
	Shutdown input from the Remote Console

Shutdown from Windows

Follow this procedure to shutdown the system:

Stop all tasks.

	You cannot shutdown Epson RC+ 8.0 while tasks are running.
	Shutdown Epson RC+ 8.0 by executing File
	 | Exit.
	Shutdown Windows.

Shutdown with Epson RC+ 8.0 Shutdown

Shutdown the system with the dialog shown below that appears when you shutdown Epson RC+ 8.0.

Shutdown from the SPEL+ program

You can shutdown the system using the Shutdown command.

For details refer to the Epson RC+ Online Help or SPEL+ Language Reference manual.

Shutdown input from the Remote Console

With the Shutdown input from the Remote Console, the controller starts the shutdown processing.

For details refer to Remote Inputs.
